item.name: Weatherproof Gaelicat
item.description:
Makes you feel toasty warm simply to behold it.

Use item to acquire the weatherproof gaelicat minion.
item.tooltip:
There is no creature so
heavenly as the cat!
   - Feline Fanatic
item.specialactiondescription:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 80 to all enemies within range while reducing DEF by 13%.
Duration: 6s
